eval_music_rel: You will be given the text of a youtube comment about a music video. Your task is to determine how relevant the comment is to the music itself as opposed to other aspects such as the video, the artist's appearance, dancing,or unrelated topics. Return a single number from 1 to 5, where 1 means completely irrelevant to the music, and 5 means highly relevant to the music. Return only the number. comment to evaluate: {sentence}
eval_video_rel: You will be given the text of a youtube comment about a music video. Your task is to determine how relevant the comment is to the visual aspects of the video itself (e.g., visuals, cinematography, special effects, dancing) as opposed to other aspects such as the music, beats, drops, song, the artist's appearance, discussion about time stamps not related to the video aspects, or unrelated topics. Return a single number from 1 to 5, where 1 means completely irrelevant to the video, and 5 means highly relevant to the video. Return only the number. comment to evaluate: {sentence}
eval_emotion: You will be given the text of a youtube comment about a music video. Your task is to determine whether the comment expresses emotions or feelings that the music evokes in the commentor. Return a single number from 1 to 5, where 1 means completely irrelevant to emotions, and 5 means highly relevant to emotions. Return only the number. comment to evaluate: {sentence}
eval_memory: You will be given the text of a youtube comment about a music video. Your task is to determine whether the comment indicates that the music evokes personal memories (either present or past) or nostalgia for the commentor. Return a single number from 1 to 5, where 1 means completely irrelevant to personal memories, and 5 means highly relevant to personal memories. Return only the number. comment to evaluate: {sentence}
eval_imaginings: You will be given the text of a youtube comment about a music video. Your task is to determine whether the comment indicates that the music evokes imagined stories, scenes, or imagery for the commentor. Return a single number from 1 to 5, where 1 means completely irrelevant to imaginations, and 5 means highly relevant to imaginations. Return only the number. comment to evaluate: {sentence}
eval_self_related: You will be given the text of a youtube comment about a music video. Your task is to determine whether the comment indicates that the music evokes emotions, thoughts, or reflections related to the commentor's own identity, experiences, or personal growth. Return a single number from 1 to 5, where 1 means completely irrelevant to self-related thoughts, and 5 means highly relevant to self-related thoughts. Return only the number. comment to evaluate: {sentence}
eval_fandom: You will be given the text of a youtube comment about a music video. Your task is to determine whether the comment indicates that the music evokes feelings of belonging to a fan community, admiration for the artist, or enthusiasm for the music genre. Return a single number from 1 to 5, where 1 means completely irrelevant to fandom, and 5 means highly relevant to fandom. Return only the number. comment to evaluate: {sentence}
